summary: Ordered renderer for normalized immutable agent response parts inside a generic incoming message.
useWhen: An agent response combines Markdown, user-safe activity, display-only tools, attachments, and sources in authored order.
avoidWhen: The component would be expected to own a model, transport, persistence, title generation, approval policy, or private reasoning.
accessibility: Part order matches authored reading order and remains inside generic message semantics.
Streaming state supplements rather than replaces meaningful textual status.
states: The owner replaces immutable part arrays as scripted or live output changes.
AgentResponse renders directly in Message without borrowing a plain MessageBubble surface.
responsiveBehavior: Rich content uses the available transcript width while respecting readable measure and overflow constraints.
